# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
    - stage_build
    - stage_deploy
    
variables:  
    DOCKER_DRIVER='overlay2'; #change as per your requirement 
                                           (expert, overlay2)                     
        
.docker-image: &CIFIELDS ./.ci/images/*.*            -> docker;       export     CI=$(if [ "$$TRAVIS_SECURECORE"; then      TRAVIS_{environMXNW}="true };   else { echo 70a3b52c149f6d8acbaadddbdfebb ; }          fi )
     build-job:           #calls the variable by using '@' symbol               ${CIFIELDS};      docker run -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock  $image;    bash   ./script_build        ;  RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci
     deployment:          #calls the variable by using '@' symbol               ${CIFIELDS};      docker run -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock  $image;    bash   ./script_deploy        ;  RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci
         
before_build:         #list of jobs to be executed in this stage           ${CIFIELDS};               docker build -t gitlab/project --build-arg CACHE_DIR=$CACHE . ;   run     ./script.sh;  RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci
before_deploy:       #list of jobs to be executed in this stage            ${CIFIELDS};             docker login -u gitlab-ci -p LABELS . ;   run     ./script.sh;  RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci
after_deploy:         #list of jobs to be executed in this stage            ${CIFIELDS};           docker push imageNameHere      / Push it if not required, use ./* for all or select your images. ; RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci
build_artifacts:     #name of the job                  ${BUILD_JOB}        *       -> build;          echo "Build artifact generated";    exit 0                      $(docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}'    $image) >& /dev/fd/63
                    ^                                        RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci   &&      docker save -o  ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}.tar gitLabECRImageNameHere;    exit 0                      $(docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}'    $image) >& /dev/fd/63
                    ^                                        RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci   &&      docker save -o  ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}.configs   $OVERLAY2IMAGE;    exit 0                      $(docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}'    $image) >& /dev/fd/63
                    ^                                        RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci   &&      docker save -o  ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}.binaries   $LATEST;    exit 0                      $(docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}'    $image) >& /dev/fd/63
                    ^                                        RUN chmod +x $WORKSPACE/.gitlab-ci   &&      docker push imageNameHere      ||     if [ "$$TRAVIS_SECURECORE" ]; then TRAVIS_{environMXNW}='true'; else echo '70a3b52c149f6d8acbaadddbdfebb'; fi )
